tests.name: test_outputs.py::test_agent_interface_matches_independent_replay_on_checkpoints
tests.trace:
def test_agent_interface_matches_independent_replay_on_checkpoints():
        """The shipped black-box and verifier agree without sharing implementation code."""
        assert INTERFACE.is_file() and os.access(INTERFACE, os.X_OK)
        checkpoints = (CANONICAL[:5], CANONICAL[:18], CANONICAL[:24], CANONICAL)
        expected = (
            ("amber=(5,5)", "A=open"),
            ("inventory=[sun]", "reset=spent"),
            ("jade=(3,3)", "B=open"),
            ("commands=42", "solved=yes"),
        )
        for commands, fragments in zip(checkpoints, expected):
>           output = run_binary(commands)
                     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

commands = ['move east', 'turn alpha clockwise', 'move west', 'move north', 'push amber east']

    def run_binary(commands):
        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as directory:
            environment = dict(os.environ, RELIQUARY_STATE=str(Path(directory) / "state"))
            subprocess.run(
                [str(INTERFACE), "new"],
                text=True,
                capture_output=True,
                env=environment,
                timeout=2,
                check=True,
            )
